name: Payroll Processing Trigger
description: On payroll processing dates, validate employee hours, calculate gross pay, and trigger payroll submission to your payroll provider API with audit logging.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT employee_id, email, SUM(hours) AS total_hours, hourly_rate, SUM(hours) * hourly_rate AS gross_pay FROM timesheets t JOIN employees e ON e.id = t.employee_id WHERE period_start >= CURRENT_DATE - 14 GROUP BY employee_id, email, hourly_rate

config.subject: Payroll Submitted — {{nodes.node-2.data.rowCount}} employees processed
config.html:
Payroll Submitted

{{nodes.node-2.data.rowCount}} employees processed for the period ending {{nodes.node-1.data.date}}.

Confirmation ID: {{nodes.node-3.data.confirmationId}}
